basic.description:
{Basic First Aid}

Allows manual control of the First Aid Tent and increases its healing to up to 50 Health.

While the First Aid Tent remains active, allied creatures gain +5% maximum Health.

The First Aid Tent cannot lose more than 40% of its maximum Health from a single attack.

advanced.description:
{Advanced First Aid}

Allows manual control of the First Aid Tent and increases its healing to up to 75 Health.

While the First Aid Tent remains active, allied creatures gain +10% maximum Health.

The First Aid Tent cannot lose more than 30% of its maximum Health from a single attack.

expert.description:
{Expert First Aid}

Allows manual control of the First Aid Tent and increases its healing to up to 100 Health.

While the First Aid Tent remains active, allied creatures gain +15% maximum Health.

The First Aid Tent and Ammo Cart cannot lose more than 20% of their maximum Health from a single attack.
